---
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Resources

  - [State Operations Manual, CMS publication number 100-07](https://www.cms.gov/Regulations-and-Guidance/Guidance/Manuals/Internet-Only-Manuals-IOMs-Items/CMS1201984)
  - [CMS Manual](https://www.cms.gov/regulations-and-guidance/guidance/manuals/downloads/som107c02.pdf)
  - [ResDAC: CMS Certification Number](https://resdac.org/cms-data/variables/full-cms-certification-number-provider)
  - [ResDAC: Provider Number](https://resdac.org/cms-data/variables/provider-number)
  - [The Joint Commission](https://manual.jointcommission.org/releases/TJC2025A/DataElem0276.html)
  - [QCOR](https://qcor.cms.gov/main.jsp)
  - [QSO: Policy & Memos](https://www.cms.gov/medicare/health-safety-standards/quality-safety-oversight-general-information/policy-memos/policy-memos-states-regions)
  - [CMS: Glossary](https://www.cms.gov/glossary)

<br>

## Valdosta CMS Entities

```{r}
x <- list(
  ASC = c(
    "AZALEA SURGERY CENTER",
    "CATARACT AND LASER SURGERY CTR OF SOUTH GA, PC",
    "ENT OF SOUTH GEORGIA SURGERY CENTER, LLC",
    "EYE ASSOCIATES SURGERY CTR",
    "HUGHSTON SURGICAL CENTER OF VALDOSTA, LLC",
    "NORTH OAK AMBULATORY SURGERY CENTER, LLC",
    "PLASTIC SURGERY OPERATIVE SUITE, LLC",
    "SOUTHERN OB/GYN AMBULATORY SURGERY CENTER",
    "SOUTHWELL LOWNDES ENDOSCOPY CENTER",
    "SOUTHWELL VALDOSTA ENDOSCOPY CENTER",
    "UROLOGICAL CLINIC OF VALDOSTA ASC, INC",
    "VALDOSTA FOOT & ANKLE SURGERY",
    "VOA AMBULATORY SURG CTR"
  ),
  ESRD = c(
    "OAK STREET DIALYSIS",
    "US RENAL CARE CENTRAL VALDOSTA",
    "US RENAL CARE SOUTH GEORGIA DIALYSIS",
    "US RENAL CARE VALDOSTA HOME PROGRAM",
    "VALDOSTA DIALYSIS CLINIC",
    "VALDOSTA HOME TRAINING"
  ),
  FQHC = c(
    "NORTHSIDE FAMILY HEALTH CENTER",
    "SOUTH CENTRAL PRIMARY CARE ASHLEY STREET"
  ),
  `SNF/NF (Dual)` = c(
    "PRUITTHEALTH CRESTWOOD, LLC",
    "PRUITTHEALTH HOLLY HILL, LLC",
    "PRUITTHEALTH LAKEHAVEN, LLC",
    "PRUITTHEALTH VALDOSTA, LLC"
  ),
  HHA = c(
    "ADORATION HOME HEALTH",
    "AMEDISYS HOME HEALTH OF VALDOSTA",
    "GEORGIA HOME HEALTH SERVICES"
  ),
  Hospice = c(
    "BETHANY HOSPICE AND PALLIATIVE CARE, LLC",
    "HEART OF HOSPICE VALDOSTA",
    "HOSPICE OF SOUTH GEORGIA",
    "PRUITTHEALTH HOSPICE VALDOSTA"
  ),
  Hospital = c(
    "GREENLEAF CENTER",
    "SGMC HEALTH",
    "US AIR FORCE HOSP"
  ),
  ICF = c(
    "PRUITTHEALTH-PARKWOOD, LLC"
  ),
  CLIA = c(
    "9 LINE HEALTH, LLC",
    "ADORATION HOME HEALTH CARE GEORGIA, LLC",
    "AIRPORT CLINIC INCORPORATED",
    "ALLIANCE RESEARCH AND TECHNOLOGY, LLC",
    "AMEDISYS GA LLC DBA AMEDISYS HOME HLTH OF VALDOSTA",
    "APPLECARE VALDOSTA",
    "AR PSYCHIATRIC & COUNSELING CENTER",
    "ARUNAS URBONAS MD PLLC",
    "AZALEA SURGERY CENTER",
    "AZALEA WOMENS CENTER",
    "BARNES HEALTH CARE SERVICES",
    "BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES OF SOUTH GEORGIA",
    "BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES OF SOUTH GEORGIA",
    "BENNETT P HOGAN MD PC",
    "BETHANY HOSPICE",
    "BPC PLASMA, INC VALDOSTA",
    "BRIAN C GRINER, MD LLC",
    "BRIDGEWAY RECOVERY CENTER",
    "CANOPY AT AZALEA GROVE, THE",
    "CARE MEDICAL CENTER",
    "CATARACT AND LASER SURGRY CTR OF SOUTH GEORGIA, PC",
    "CHANCY DRUGS VALDOSTA",
    "COLE DERMATOLOGY, LLC",
    "CRH CARDIOLOGY GROUP VALDOSTA",
    "DCA OF CENTRAL VALDOSTA LLC DBA",
    "DCA OF SO GA, LLC",
    "DIABETES MANAGEMENT CENTER",
    "DR SUNIL T PERSAUD",
    "ENT OF SOUTH GEORGIA SURGERY CENTER, LLC",
    "EYE ASSOCIATES OF SOUTH GA, LLC",
    "EYE ASSOCIATES SURGERY CENTER",
    "FP-PEACHTREE IMMEDIATE CARE VDW",
    "FP-PEACHTREE IMMEDIATE CARE VLD",
    "GEORGIA CVS PHARMACY, LLC DBA CVS/PHARMACY #04534",
    "GHHS HEALTHCARE, LLC",
    "GRACE HOSPICE, LLC",
    "GREENLEAF CENTER",
    "HOGAN'S PHARMACY",
    "HOSPICE OF SOUTH GA",
    "HUGHSTON MEDICAL GROUP VALDOSTA",
    "HUGHSTON SURGICAL CENTER OF VALDOSTA, LLC",
    "IT'S JUST BLOOD DIAGNOSTIC TESTING CENTER LLC",
    "JOHN D ANDERSON MD",
    "JOSE MEDINA MD",
    "KIDS HEALTH OF VALDOSTA",
    "LANGDALE HOSPICE HOUSE",
    "LANGDALE PLACE",
    "LOWNDES COUNTY FIRE AND RESCUE",
    "LOWNDES COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT",
    "LOWNDES COUNTY JAIL",
    "LOWNDES COUNTY SCHOOLS",
    "MIDWIFE ME ITD DBA RED MOON MIDWIFERY",
    "NATIONAL FAMILY MEDICAL ASSOCIATES OF GEORGIA LLC",
    "NATIONWIDE MEDICAL & DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES",
    "NORTH OAK FAMILY MEDICINE LLC",
    "NORTHSIDE FAMILY HEALTH",
    "NRA VALDOSTA GEORGIA, LLC",
    "OAK STREET DIALYSIS",
    "OCTAPHARMA PLASMA, INC",
    "OPTIONS NOW, A LIFE CHOICE CLINIC",
    "PACKAGING CORPORATION OF AMERICA",
    "PARROTT MEDICAL CLINIC PC",
    "PARTNERSHIP HEALTH CENTER",
    "PARTNERS IN HEALTH MANAGEMENT LLC",
    "PATHWAY TO HOPE COUNSELING SERVICES, INC",
    "PEDIATRIA HEALTHCARE LLC DBA AVEANNA HEALTHCARE",
    "PLASTIC SURGERY OPERATIVE SUITE LLC",
    "PREMISE HEALTH OF GEORGIA MEDICAL PC",
    "PREMISE HEALTH OF GEORGIA MEDICAL, PC",
    "PRUITTHEALTH-HOLLY HILL, LLC",
    "PRUITTHEALTH-HOME FIRST, INC",
    "PRUITTHEALTH-HOSPICE VALDOSTA",
    "PRUITTHEALTH-LAKEHAVEN, LLC",
    "PRUITTHEALTH-PARKWOOD, LLC",
    "PRUITTHEALTH-PHARMACY SERVICES VALDOSTA, INC",
    "PRUITTHEALTH-VALDOSTA, LLC",
    "PRUITTHEALTH-VALDOSTA, LLC",
    "PRUITTHEALTH-CRESTWOOD, LLC",
    "PUBLIX PHARMACY #0430",
    "PUBLIX PHARMACY #1435",
    "RIGHT CHOICE LAB SERVICES, LLC",
    "RURAL URGENT CARE",
    "SCINTILLA CHARTER ACADEMY",
    "SEPA PC AT AZALEA VALDOSTA GEORGIA",
    "SGMC CARDIAC ELECTROPHYSIOLOGY",
    "SGMC CARDIOLOGY",
    "SGMC CARDIOVASCULAR INSTITUTE",
    "SGMC FAMILY MEDICINE OAK STREET",
    "SGMC GENERAL SURGERY",
    "SGMC HEALTH",
    "SGMC HEALTHCARE SOUTH",
    "SGMC HEALTH SMITH NORTHVIEW HOSPITAL",
    "SGMC INTERNAL MEDICINE PARK AVENUE",
    "SGMC NEUROLOGY & NEUROSCIENCE",
    "SGMC PRIMARY CARE CONNELL",
    "SGMC PRIMARY CARE GREYSTONE",
    "SGMC PRIMARY CARE KINGS WAY",
    "SGMC PRIMARY CARE NORTHSIDE DR",
    "SGMC SMITH NORTHVIEW CAMPUS",
    "SGMC URGENT CARE GRIFFIN AVENUE",
    "SGMC URGENT CARE NORTH VALDOSTA",
    "SGMC UROLOGY",
    "SGMC VALDOSTA MEDICAL CLINIC",
    "SGMC WOMENS HEALTH OAK",
    "SMITH CLINIC, LLC",
    "SOUTH CENTRAL PRIMARY CARE ASHLEY STREET",
    "SOUTHERN HOME CARE SERVICES, INC",
    "SOUTHERN OB/GYN AMBULATORY SURGERY CENTER",
    "SOUTHERN OB/GYN ASSOCIATES PC",
    "SOUTHERN PEDIATRIC CLINIC ACUTE CARE",
    "SOUTHERN PEDIATRIC CLINIC, LLC",
    "SOUTHERN PODIATRY GROUP PC",
    "SOUTH GA MED CTR DEPT PULMONARY SVCS",
    "SOUTH GEORGIA EYE PARTNERS",
    "SOUTH GEORGIA MEDICAL ASSOCIATES PC",
    "SOUTH GEORGIA MEDICAL CENTER EMS",
    "SOUTH GEORGIA PEDIATRICS & ALLERGY CTR",
    "SOUTH GEORGIA TOXICOLOGY, LLC",
    "SOUTHLAND URO+GYNECOLOGY, LLC",
    "SOUTHWELL AMBULATORY, INC",
    "SOUTHWELL AMBULATORY, INC",
    "SOUTHWELL AMBULATORY, INC",
    "SOUTHWELL AMBULATORY, INC DBA SOUTHWELL LOWNDES",
    "SOUTHWELL GASTROENTEROLOGY",
    "SOUTHWELL GASTROENTEROLOGY",
    "SOUTHWELL OB/GYN",
    "THACKER DERMATOLOGY, LLC",
    "THE HOWARD CENTER FOR WOMENS HEALTH",
    "TREATMENT CENTER OF VALDOSTA",
    "UC-PEACHTREE IMMEDIATE CARE VDW",
    "UC-PEACHTREE IMMEDIATE CARE VLD",
    "UROLOGICAL CLINIC OF VALDOSTA AMBULATORY SURGICAL",
    "U SAVE IT PHARMACY",
    "USRC VALDOSTA HOME PROGRAM, LLC",
    "VALDOSTA CBOC",
    "VALDOSTA CHILDREN'S HEALTHCARE",
    "VALDOSTA CHILDREN'S HEALTHCARE",
    "VALDOSTA CITY SCHOOLS DISTRICT",
    "VALDOSTA EYE CENTER",
    "VALDOSTA FAMILY MEDICINE ASSOCIATES",
    "VALDOSTA FIRE DEPARTMENT",
    "VALDOSTA FOOT AND ANKLE CLINIC",
    "VALDOSTA HEALTH & WELLNESS CLINIC",
    "VALDOSTA HOME TRAINING",
    "VALDOSTA INTERNAL MEDICINE",
    "VALDOSTA ORTHOPEDIC ASSOCIATES",
    "VALDOSTA ORTHOPEDIC ASSOCIATES, PC",
    "VALDOSTA PSYCHIATRIC ASSOCIATES",
    "VALDOSTA STATE PRISON",
    "VALDOSTA STATE UNIVERSITY HEALTH CENTER",
    "VALDOSTA TRANSITIONAL CENTER",
    "VALDOSTA WEIGHT LOSS & WELLNESS",
    "VALDOSTA WELLNESS AND SKIN CLINIC LLC",
    "VEEDHATA OM LLC DBA PRIME DIAGNOSTICS",
    "VEMA HOLISTIC HEALTH, LLC",
    "VOA AMBULATORY SURGERY CENTER",
    "WALGREENS #17706",
    "WALGREENS #6899",
    "WALGREENS #9305",
    "WALMART PHARMACY 10-2615",
    "WALMART PHARMACY 10-6732",
    "WALMART PHARMACY 10-899",
    "WIREGRASS GEORGIA TECH COLLEGE STUDENT HLTH CTR",
    "WOMENS HEALTH PATTERSON"
  )
)
purrr::map(x, \(x) cheapr::fast_df(name = x)) |> 
  purrr::list_rbind(names_to = "type") |> 
  tibble::as_tibble() |> 
  gt::gt(
    groupname_col = "type", 
    row_group_as_column = TRUE) |> 
  gt::tab_options(
    table.width = gt::pct(100),
    quarto.disable_processing = TRUE) |>
  gtExtras::gt_theme_nytimes() |>
  gt::tab_style(
    style = gt::cell_text(
      font = gt::google_font(name = "JetBrains Mono"),
      color = "grey50",
      size = "small"
    ),
    locations = gt::cells_body(columns = name)
  ) |>
  gt::tab_style(
    style = gt::cell_text(
      font = gt::google_font(name = "JetBrains Mono"),
      weight = "bold"
      ),
    locations = gt::cells_row_groups()
  )
```
